calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc S. Applebaum (619-756-7378) of Kettner Law Corp. for Plaintiff/opposing party, Randy Hom, via Court
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff's counsel accepts responsibilty for lack of compliance with order from 3/20/17. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: The Court does not issue Order to Show Cause as to Plaintiff's Counsel. Counsel to comply with order regarding amended complaint. Demurrer is Sustained with 10-day leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. All amendments in the Second Amended Complaint shall be underlined and bold. Moving party to prepare order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Continued To Apr-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 20, 2017 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of late-filed opposition no later than March 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court will consider late-filed opposition. Defendant to file a substantive reply five court days before the new hearing date. Judge A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT METROPOLITAN BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint on file. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
